text:

Ronald Kuehn <rk@ronald.org> mentioned:

> 
> Hi,

> that's fine with me. I'm currently unable to properly maintain

> maintainer of graphics/ocaml-lablgl please change the MAINTAINER
> line to ports@freebsd.org.
> 
> Ronald
>

Ok, I will maintain it.

Thanks!
